The 2024 results of “BAGEP” have been announced

The results of the Science Academy’s Young Scientists Award Program, “BAGEP,” which is initiated by the Science Academy and run with financial support from the community rather than public funds, have been announced for the year 2024.

Our awarded academics:

Assistant Professor Dr. Akın Sefer – Core Program

Assistant Professor Dr. Özen Baş – New Media
